desc: Imports small power and data systems from a MEPBridge JSON file with Neural Loading visualization.
summary: Imports small power and data systems from a MEPBridge JSON file with Neural Loading visualization. Uses JsonModelLoader to parse the JSON DTO, then routes through MepSegmentCreator, PlaceElbowAtCorner, TakeoffPlacementService, PlaceTransitionBetweenSizes, and ImportBlocksFromLinkedDwg for element creation. Family downloads handled by FindFamilyInAdelphos. Base point resolved via DesignSystemBasePointHelper. Related: DesignContainmentSystemCommand, DesignLightingSystemCommand.
usecase: User wants to import a small power layout from AutoCAD via MEPBridge JSON. User needs to place socket outlets, data points, and associated containment.
notfor: Creating small power manually element-by-element. Importing lighting or fire alarm systems (use respective commands).
precondition: Active Revit document must be open. MEPBridge JSON file must exist at the configured path. Cable tray family types must be loaded. Level must exist near the base point Z.
postcondition: MEP segments, fittings, and power outlets are created in the model. A run log is written.

selection_inputs.name: BasePoint
selection_inputs.description: Base point for small power placement
selection_inputs.prompt: Pick Revit basepoint (target origin for import)

outputs.name: CurvesCreated
outputs.description: Number of MEP curve segments created

preprompts: Importing small power system from JSON...
successprompts: Small power imported! Created {CurvesCreated} segments, {ElbowsPlaced} elbows, {BlocksPlaced} outlets.
